title: Taxi Skradin to Zadar Airport | Fixed €105 Transfer | TAXI Antonio
description: Private taxi and transfer from Skradin to Zadar Airport. Fixed €105 per car, up to 4 passengers, door to door. Book direct with Antonio.
keywords: taxi skradin to zadar airport, transfer skradin to zadar airport, skradin to zadar airport taxi, skradin to zadar airport transfer

schema.name: Taxi Skradin to Zadar Airport
schema.description: Private, fixed-price taxi and transfer from Skradin to Zadar Airport, 105 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, door to door.

offers.description: One-way private transfer from Skradin to Zadar Airport, per car for up to 4 passengers. Return 210 euros.

mainEntity.name: How far is Zadar Airport from Skradin, and how long is the drive?

acceptedAnswer.text: The drive from Skradin to Zadar Airport is around 61 km and takes roughly 50 min in normal traffic, a little longer at busy times in summer. I plan the pickup so a slow patch never leaves you rushed.

mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi from Skradin to Zadar Airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 105 per car, one way, for up to 4 passengers. The price is per vehicle, not per person, and includes tolls, fuel and luggage. A return trip is 210.

mainEntity.name: What time should I leave Skradin for my flight?

acceptedAnswer.text: As a rule, about 3 hours before an international flight and 2 hours before a domestic one. Tell me your flight time and I will confirm the exact pickup.

mainEntity.name: Do you drop us right at the departures terminal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I take you straight to the departures drop-off at Zadar Airport and help with your luggage. No parking walk, no shuttle.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can confirm the car and your pickup, and earlier for early-morning flights and high season. For a sooner ride, call or WhatsApp me directly.
